THIS MAJOR IS HIGHLY SELECTIVE.</p><p><br></p><p>To be considered for this major, you must complete the following courses by the end of spring before transfer:</p><ul><li>One year of Biology for Major with Lab,</li><li>One year of General Chemistry,</li><li>One year of Calculus, and</li><li>One semester of Organic Chemistry with Lab.</li></ul><p>Completion of a second semester of Organic Chemistry or one year of Calculus Based Physics is <strong>STRONGLY RECOMMENDED.</strong> If your school does not offer a two semester or three quarter sequence in calculus based physics, it is recommended that you complete Physics 5ABC at UCLA after transfer.</p><p>All courses must be taken for a letter grade.</p><p><br></p><p>For more information regarding this major and UCLA's transfer selection process,
